items.title: Tyler Nickel shot 41.3% on 9.2 three-point attempts per game at Summer League.
items.author: Tommy Beer
items.body_excerpt:
Tyler Nickel shot 41.3% on 9.2 three-point attempts per game at Summer League. 

He is just the second player this decade to average more than nine 3PTA per game and shoot over 40% from downtown in Vegas (the other cat in this club is Cavs' Sam Merrill) 

Leon found one.

items.author: Omari Sankofa II
items.body_excerpt:
Chaz hit a 3 right over Nickel at the buzzer, then pushed (maybe shoved) Kayil to create room and knock down another one. 

He has 18 points and is 6-8 from deep. Shot 7-12 from 3 yesterday. On an extended heater

items.title: Knicks confirm that Mo Diawara, Pacome Dadiet and Dillion Jones, along with second-round pick Tyler Nickel, will play for the Knicks summer league squad in Las Vegas this month.
items.author: Tommy Beer
items.body_excerpt:
Knicks confirm that Mo Diawara, Pacome Dadiet and Dillion Jones, along with second-round pick Tyler Nickel, will play for the Knicks summer league squad in Las Vegas this month.

Unfortunately, Jack Kayil is not on the roster. Further indication he will be stashed overseason next season.
